name: ux-ui-design
description: HTML/CSS/JS mockup-first UI/UX design. Generate multi-option screen mockups, multi-page user flows, and design-system palettes as throwaway single-file mockups in .mockups/ for alignment before implementation. Loosely integrates with agile-workflow.

interface.longDescription: Seven skills for design-phase UI/UX work: ux-ui-principles (auto-loading reference + AGENTS.md convention installer, with CLAUDE.md compatibility), palette (color + typography design system), components (reusable component library + showcase), motion (named easing curves + Doherty-coupled durations + spring presets + reduced-motion), screens (4-option single-screen mockups), flows (multi-page user journeys — sequential, hub-and-spoke, hybrid, map-as-canvas, chat-as-canvas), adopt (existing-project bootstrap that scans, audits, and orchestrates the pipeline in mirror, reimagine, or diegetic-prototype mode with Whose-Default mirror-mocks). All outputs are standalone single-file HTML mockups in .mockups/ — throwaway artifacts that align design decisions before implementation, loosely integrated with agile-workflow item ids.
defaultPrompt: Use ux-ui-design to create mockup-first UI/UX design artifacts before production code.
